title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 21 - 2017: Collecting Green Screens

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on June 21, 2017, sharing a casual update about his day including a tip he saw for using phone earphones as a microphone. He talks about collecting over 2,000 green screen assets for his videos and plans to sort through them, visit a doctor, and go to his mom's house for a meal.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: thinks it's a clever, cheap way to get better audio for recordings
excited about having 2,000+ green screens to use in videos despite the editing work involved
